creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you change pkg-descr of p5-Unicode-UTF8 to something like (portlint says yours is too short):

This module provides functions to encode and decode UTF-8 encoding form as
specified by Unicode and ISO/IEC 10646:2011.

In p5-Unicode-UTF8 post-install is commented, is it needed or not? Can we delete it?
